name: Infinity X
tagline: Feature-heavy updates presented without turning release notes into a mess.
highlights: Designed for denser change sets while keeping release notes readable.
Per-ROM tracking keeps feature-heavy builds separate from the rest of the list.
Side metadata gives testers a quick read on date, devices, and release source.
changelog: Grouped the current feature-track work into one clearer release track.
Kept tester-facing changes readable despite the broader change set.
Aligned release metadata and targeting across pacman and pacmanpro.
